extraction.one_line_summary: PHILIPSEN Jasper won his fourth stage sprint as peloton nervously controlled through rain with 60km to go, preventing GC splits despite wind forecast
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma and UAE Emirates actively chased breakaway at 60km when rain/wind forecast materialized, prioritizing GC protection over sprint leadout.
Alpecin-Deceuninck absent from front organization unlike previous sprint stages, yet Philipsen still won from suboptimal position.

rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: positive: won fourth sprint without visible Alpecin leadout train, showing ability to finish from chaos
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: negative: no presence noted in sprint despite earlier intermediate sprint contest with Philipsen, suggesting form/role shift
